name: Hon. (Prof.) G. L. Peiris, M.P.
academic_qualifications: Bachelor of Law (First Class Honours (Ceylon) 1967; Doctor of Philosophy (Oxford) 1971; Doctor of Philosophy (Sri Lanka) 1974
professional_qualifications: Assistant Lecturer in Law 1968; Lecturer in Law, 1971 - 1975 ; Associate Professor of Law 1975- 1979; Acting Dean of the Faculty of Law 1977 ; Head of the Department of Law 1978 - 1983 ; Professor of Law since 1979 ; Dean of the Faculty of Law, 1983 ;Vice Chancellor - 1989
